allow: Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./node_modules/@iconify-json/carbon/icons.json'\); const names=Object.keys\(c.icons\); console.log\('slack:', names.filter\(n=>n.includes\('slack'\)\)\); console.log\('github:', names.filter\(n=>n.includes\('github'\)\)\); console.log\('postgres:', names.filter\(n=>n.includes\('postgre'\)||n.includes\('sql'\)\)\); console.log\('bot/robot:', names.filter\(n=>n.includes\('bot'\)||n.includes\('robot'\)\)\); console.log\('ai/machine:', names.filter\(n=>n.includes\('machine-learning'\)||n==='ai-status'||n.includes\('chip'\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\('@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/mcp.js'\).then\(m=>console.log\('mcp.js OK keys:',Object.keys\(m\)\)\); import\('@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/streamableHttp.js'\).then\(m=>console.log\('streamableHttp OK:',Object.keys\(m\)\)\); import\('@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/sse.js'\).then\(m=>console.log\('sse OK:',Object.keys\(m\)\)\); import\('@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/types.js'\).then\(m=>console.log\('types isInitializeRequest:', typeof m.isInitializeRequest\)\);")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8848/api/todos -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"title":"todo qua REST"}')
